title: Hadron Pipeline Spec v2
description: Schema for Hadron pipeline YAML/JSON files. Validates both v1 (linear) and v2 (DAG) pipelines. Source of truth: internal/pipeline/pipeline.go Spec, Meta, Stage, Position structs.

stop_on_fail.description: When true, a stage failure prevents downstream stages from running. Defaults to true if omitted.

stages.description: Ordered list of pipeline stages. In v1 (no depends_on), stages run sequentially by array order. In v2, stages form a DAG via depends_on.

inputs.description: Pipeline-level inputs: string keys with values of any type, available to all stages as template context.

version.description: Pipeline spec version. 1 = linear (array-order), 2 = DAG (depends_on). Optional; defaults to 1 semantics when omitted.

x.description: Horizontal pixel coordinate for visual canvas layout.

y.description: Vertical pixel coordinate for visual canvas layout.

name.description: Unique name for this stage within the pipeline. Referenced by depends_on in other stages.

blueprint_path.description: Path to the Hadron blueprint YAML file to execute for this stage.

inputs.description: Key-value pairs passed into the stage blueprint as template context. Values may reference upstream outputs via template syntax (e.g. {{ .stages.build.outputs.version }}).

if.description: Conditional execution template. The stage is skipped when this evaluates to false or an empty string. Evaluated after all depends_on stages complete.

depends_on.description: Stage names that must complete before this stage runs. Defines DAG edges. Note: cross-reference validation (ensuring referenced names exist) cannot be enforced by JSON Schema alone and is handled at runtime.

position.description: Layout metadata for visual canvas rendering. Has no effect on execution.

outputs.description: Named key-value pairs emitted by the stage. Keys must match ^[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9_\-]*$. Values are template strings evaluated after the stage completes.
